tinker.name: Code Image
tinker.description: Generate beautiful images from code snippets

zh-CN.name: 代码图片
zh-CN.description: 将代码片段生成为美观的可分享图片

generate.description: Generate a code screenshot PNG end to end: apply the code and display options in the UI, then export the image. Same visual result as configuring the toolbar and clicking save.

code.description: Source code to render in the image

path.description: Absolute path to save the PNG file

language.description: Syntax highlighting language key. Defaults to the current UI setting.

theme.description: Color theme id. Defaults to the current UI setting.

darkMode.description: Use dark (true) or light (false) variant of the theme. Defaults to the current UI setting.

showLineNumbers.description: Whether to show line numbers. Defaults to the current UI setting.

fileName.description: Window title shown in the frame (e.g. app.tsx). Defaults to the current UI setting.

format.description: Pretty-print the code before rendering. Supported for javascript, typescript, css, html, and json. Defaults to false.
